talents.name: Convection
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Shock, Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning spells by 2%.

talents.name: Concussion
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning and Shock spells by 1%.

talents.name: Earth's Grasp
talents.description: Increases the health of your Stoneclaw Totem by 25% and the radius of your Earthbind Totem by 10%.

talents.name: Elemental Warding
talents.description: Reduces damage taken from Fire, Frost and Nature effects by 4%.

talents.name: Call of Flame
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire Totems by 5%.

talents.name: Elemental Focus
talents.description: After landing a critical strike with a Fire, Frost, or Nature damage spell, you enter a Clearcasting state. The Clearcasting state reduces the mana cost of your next 2 damage spells by 40%.

talents.name: Reverberation
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Shock spells by 0.2 sec.

talents.name: Call of Thunder
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning spells by an additional 1%.

talents.name: Improved Fire Totems
talents.description: Reduces the delay before your Fire Nova Totem activates by 1 sec. and decreases the threat generated by your Magma Totem by 25%.

talents.name: Eye of the Storm
talents.description: Gives you a 33% chance to gain the Focused Casting effect that lasts for 6 sec after being the victim of a melee or ranged critical strike. The Focused Casting effect prevents you from losing casting time on Shaman spells when taking damage. (Proc chance: 33%)

talents.name: Elemental Devastation
talents.description: Your offensive spell crits will increase your chance to get a critical strike with melee attacks by 3% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Storm Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning spells by 3 yards.

talents.name: Elemental Fury
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Searing, Magma, and Fire Nova Totems and your Fire, Frost, and Nature spells by 100%.

talents.name: Unrelenting Storm
talents.description: Regenerate mana equal to 2% of your Intellect every 5 sec, even while casting.

talents.name: Elemental Precision
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with Fire, Frost and Nature spells by 2% and reduces the threat caused by Fire, Frost and Nature spells by 4%.

talents.name: Lightning Mastery
talents.description: Reduces the cast time of your Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning spells by 0.1 sec.

talents.name: Elemental Mastery
talents.description: When activated, this spell gives your next Fire, Frost, or Nature damage spell a 100% critical strike chance and reduces the mana cost by 100%.

talents.name: Elemental Shields
talents.description: Reduces the chance you will be critically hit by melee and ranged attacks by 2%.

talents.name: Lightning Overload
talents.description: Gives your Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning spells a 4% chance to cast a second, similar spell on the same target at no additional cost that causes half damage and no threat. (Proc chance: 4%)

talents.name: Totem of Wrath
talents.description: Summons a Totem of Wrath with 5 health at the feet of the caster. The totem increases the chance to hit and critically strike with spells by 3% for all party members within 20 yards. Lasts 2 min.

talents.name: Ancestral Knowledge
talents.description: Increases your maximum mana by 1%.

talents.name: Shield Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to block attacks with a shield by 1% and increases the amount blocked by 5%.

talents.name: Guardian Totems
talents.description: Increases the amount of damage reduced by your Stoneskin Totem and Windwall Totem by 10% and reduces the cooldown of your Grounding Totem by 1 sec.

talents.name: Thundering Strikes
talents.description: Improves your chance to get a critical strike with your weapon attacks by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Ghost Wolf
talents.description: Reduces the cast time of your Ghost Wolf spell by 1 sec.

talents.name: Improved Lightning Shield
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Lightning Shield orbs by 5%.

talents.name: Enhancing Totems
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Strength of Earth and Grace of Air Totems by 8%.

talents.name: Shamanistic Focus
talents.description: After landing a melee critical strike, you enter a Focused state. The Focused state reduces the mana cost of your next Shock spell by 60%.

talents.name: Anticipation
talents.description: Increases your chance to dodge by an additional 1%.

talents.name: Flurry
talents.description: Increases your attack speed by 10% for your next 3 swings after dealing a critical strike.

talents.name: Toughness
talents.description: Increases your armor value from items by 2%, and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Weapon Totems
talents.description: Increases the melee attack power bonus of your Windfury Totem by 15% and increases the damage caused by your Flametongue Totem by 6%.

talents.name: Spirit Weapons
talents.description: Gives a chance to parry enemy melee attacks and reduces the threat generated by your melee attacks by 30%.

talents.name: Elemental Weapons
talents.description: Increases the damage caused by your Rockbiter Weapon by 7%, your Windfury Weapon effect by 13% and increases the damage caused by your Flametongue Weapon and Frostbrand Weapon by 5%.

talents.name: Mental Quickness
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your instant cast Shaman spells by 2% and increases your spell damage and healing by an amount equal to 10% of your attack power.

talents.name: Weapon Mastery
talents.description: Increases the damage you deal with all weapons by 2%.

talents.name: Dual Wield Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit while dual wielding by an additional 2%.

talents.name: Dual Wield
talents.description: Allows one-hand and off-hand weapons to be equipped in the off-hand.

talents.name: Stormstrike
talents.description: Instantly attack with both weapons. In addition, the next 2 sources of Nature damage dealt to the target are increased by 20%. Lasts 12 sec.

talents.name: Unleashed Rage
talents.description: Causes your critical hits with melee attacks to increase all party members' melee attack power by 2% if within 20 yards of the Shaman. Lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Shamanistic Rage
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 30% and gives your successful melee attacks a chance to regenerate mana equal to 30% of your attack power. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Improved Healing Wave
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Healing Wave spell by 0.1 sec.

talents.name: Tidal Focus
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your healing spells by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Reincarnation
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Reincarnation spell by 10 min and increases the amount of health and mana you reincarnate with by an additional 10%.

talents.name: Ancestral Healing
talents.description: Increases your target's armor value by 8% for 15 sec after getting a critical effect from one of your healing spells.

talents.name: Totemic Focus
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your totems by 5%.

talents.name: Nature's Guidance
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with melee attacks and spells by 1%.

talents.name: Healing Focus
talents.description: Gives you a 14% chance to avoid interruption caused by damage while casting any Shaman healing spell.

talents.name: Totemic Mastery
talents.description: The radius of your totems that affect friendly targets is increased to 30 yards.

talents.name: Healing Grace
talents.description: Reduces the threat generated by your healing spells by 5% and reduces the chance your spells will be dispelled by 10%.

talents.name: Restorative Totems
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Mana Spring and Healing Stream Totems by 5%.

talents.name: Tidal Mastery
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your healing and lightning spells by 1%.

talents.name: Healing Way
talents.description: Your Healing Wave spells have a 33% chance to increase the effect of subsequent Healing Wave spells on that target by 6% for 15 sec. This effect will stack up to 3 times.

talents.name: Nature's Swiftness
talents.description: When activated, your next Nature spell with a casting time less than 10 sec. becomes an instant cast spell.

talents.name: Focused Mind
talents.description: Reduces the duration of any Silence or Interrupt effects used against the Shaman by 10%. This effect does not stack with other similar effects.

talents.name: Purification
talents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your healing spells by 2%.

talents.name: Mana Tide Totem
talents.description: Summons a Mana Tide Totem with 5 health at the feet of the caster for 12 sec that restores 6% of total mana every 3 seconds to group members within 20 yards.

talents.name: Nature's Guardian
talents.description: Whenever a damaging attack is taken that reduces you below 30% health, you have a 10% chance to heal 10% of your total health and reduce your threat level on that target. 5 second cooldown. (Proc chance: 10%, 5s cooldown)

talents.name: Nature's Blessing
talents.description: Increases your spell damage and healing by an amount equal to 10% of your Intellect.

talents.name: Improved Chain Heal
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by your Chain Heal spell by 10%.

talents.name: Earth Shield
talents.description: Protects the target with an earthen shield, giving a 30% chance of ignoring spell interruption when damaged and causing attacks to heal the shielded target for 150. This effect can only occur once every few seconds. 6 charges. Lasts 10 min. Earth Shield can only be placed on one target at a time and only one Elemental Shield can be active on a target at a time. (3.5s cooldown)
